narrative:
Royalton Twp township has 1,038 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
